title: Childcare search & occasional care
intro: These resources help you find registered daycare (kinderdagverblijf), compare options, or cover short gaps. They are not substitutes for municipal lists, waiting-list reality, or your contract — always confirm hours, fees, and quality with the provider.

items.reason: National directory to locate centres near home or work while you model commute + monthly fees in this calculator.
Flexible babysitting when you are between permanent childcare arrangements or need ad-hoc cover.

disclosure: Links above are independent resources unless marked otherwise on the card. Separate banking and insurance picks appear below.
